category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a lightweight RPC library based on XML and HTTP; official SourceForge page describes XML-RPC client/server library for C/C++.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge project title is XML-RPC for C/C++ (Xmlrpc-c); source_facts.name is xmlrpc-c.
docs_sources: Official xmlrpc-c site labels https://xmlrpc-c.sourceforge.io/doc/ as the user manual and master copy of the document.
repo_sources: Official xmlrpc-c downloading page states the SourceForge Subversion repository URL is http://svn.code.sf.net/p/xmlrpc-c/code.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies XML/HTTP RPC library; official SourceForge page describes C/C++ XML-RPC server/client library.
